source_authority: Reserve Bank of India — Monetary Policy Committee

mpc_meetings.verbatim_quote: The MPC unanimously voted to reduce the policy repo rate by 25 basis points to 6.00 per cent with immediate effect.

mpc_meetings.dissent_note: Shri Saugata Bhattacharya voted for only 25 bps cut
mpc_meetings.verbatim_quote: the MPC voted to reduce the policy repo rate by 50 basis points (bps) to 5.50 per cent with immediate effect.
the MPC voted to maintain the policy repo rate at 5.50 per cent

mpc_meetings.vote: 6-0 unanimous on rate; 4-2 on stance (2 dissented preferring Accommodative)
mpc_meetings.dissent_note: Dr. Nagesh Kumar and Prof. Ram Singh dissented on stance, preferring Accommodative over Neutral
mpc_meetings.verbatim_quote: the MPC unanimously voted to keep the policy repo rate under the liquidity adjustment facility (LAF) unchanged at 5.50 per cent

mpc_meetings.vote: 6-0 unanimous on rate; 5-1 on stance (Prof. Ram Singh preferred Accommodative)
mpc_meetings.verbatim_quote: voted unanimously to reduce the policy repo rate

mpc_meetings.vote: 6-0 unanimous on rate; 5-1 on stance (Prof. Ram Singh preferred Accommodative)
mpc_meetings.verbatim_quote: the MPC voted unanimously to keep the policy repo rate under the liquidity adjustment facility (LAF) unchanged at 5.25 per cent.

series.source: RBI MPC press release April 9, 2025 — prid=60176 (rbi.org.in); cut from 6.25% to 6.00%, unanimous, Accommodative stance
No MPC meeting in May 2025; rate unchanged from April 9, 2025 decision
RBI MPC press release June 6, 2025 — prid=60604 (rbi.org.in); cut from 6.00% to 5.50%, 5-1 vote, Neutral stance
No MPC meeting in July 2025; rate unchanged from June 6, 2025 decision
RBI MPC press release August 6, 2025 — prid=60957 (rbi.org.in); held at 5.50%, unanimous, Neutral stance
No MPC meeting in September 2025; rate unchanged (Oct 1 meeting covered Sep 29 - Oct 1)
RBI MPC press release October 1, 2025 — prid=61332 (rbi.org.in); held at 5.50%, unanimous, Neutral stance
No MPC meeting in November 2025; rate unchanged from October 1, 2025 decision
RBI MPC press release December 5, 2025 — prid=61749 (rbi.org.in); cut from 5.50% to 5.25%, unanimous, Neutral stance
No MPC meeting in January 2026; rate unchanged from December 5, 2025 decision
RBI MPC press release February 6, 2026 — prid=62169 (rbi.org.in); held at 5.25%, unanimous, Neutral stance
No MPC meeting in March 2026; rate unchanged from February 6, 2026 decision

notes: RBI cut repo rate 3 times in FY2025-26 for a total of 100 bps: -25bps in April, -50bps in June, -25bps in December. Rate fell from 6.25% (pre-period) to 5.25% by end of FY26. June 2025 was an unusually large 50bps cut (5-1 vote). All other decisions unanimous. Stance: Accommodative after April cut, back to Neutral after June cut. SDF rate at 5.00%, MSF/Bank Rate at 5.50% as of Dec 2025 cut.
